text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Are you nervous, Trainer? Restless? Having
trouble breathing?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Feel free to let me know. You don't need to act
tough. If you feel uneasy, I-I'll... Um...
choice_data_list: You seem like the nervous one here.
You seem like the nervous one here.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Well, now that you mention it... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I got a bit carried away, didn't I? I just can't wait
to show everyone how amazing you are.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: And I'll prove it with this race! ♪
